content.text: Find the Wikipedia article on the Fibonacci sequence, summarize Binet's formula, and verify F(20) using Python.

tools_available.name: google_search
tools_available.description: Web search via Google. Returns top-N results as title+snippet+URL list.

input_schema.description: Web search via Google. Returns top-N results as title+snippet+URL list. (concrete shape: TOOL_INPUT_SCHEMAS.google_search)

tools_available.name: web_fetch
tools_available.description: Fetch a web page and return cleaned main content as Markdown. HTML only.

input_schema.description: Fetch a web page and return cleaned main content as Markdown. HTML only. (concrete shape: TOOL_INPUT_SCHEMAS.web_fetch)

tools_available.name: code_interpreter
tools_available.description: Execute Python 3 code in a sandbox. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code.

input_schema.description: Execute Python 3 code in a sandbox. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code. (concrete shape: TOOL_INPUT_SCHEMAS.code_interpreter)

evaluation.expected_summary: Synthetic mixed task — verify tool sequence and answer relevance.
